faq-grid-sub.content: Quick answers to help you get started faster.

faq-card-1.title: How do I reset my password?
faq-card-1.description: Click 'Forgot password' on the login page. Enter your email and follow the link sent to your inbox. The reset link expires after 24 hours.

faq-card-2.title: What payment methods do you accept?
faq-card-2.description: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and PayPal. Annual plans can also be paid via wire transfer or ACH.

faq-card-3.title: Can I export my data?
faq-card-3.description: Yes. Go to Settings > Data Export to download your data in CSV, JSON, or PDF format. Exports are available on all plans.

faq-card-4.title: Do you have a mobile app?
faq-card-4.description: Our iOS and Android apps are available on their respective app stores. They sync with your web account in real time.

faq-card-5.title: How do I invite team members?
faq-card-5.description: Open your workspace settings and click 'Invite Members.' Enter their email addresses and assign roles. They'll receive an invitation link instantly.

faq-card-6.title: What's your uptime guarantee?
faq-card-6.description: We maintain 99.95% uptime across all services. Our status page at status.example.com provides real-time monitoring and incident history.
